title: Colored Axolotl Buckets
description: Now you can see what color the axolotl is in the bucket (CIT Resewn or optifine is not needed)
body:
# 📖 About
Now you can see what color the axolotl is in the bucket **(CIT Resewn or optifine is not needed)**
